component.name: Loofi Fedora Tweaks
component.summary: Complete Fedora system management with AI, security, and window management

description.p: A comprehensive GUI control center for Fedora KDE 44 covering system maintenance, developer tooling, AI integration, security hardening, window management, virtualization, mesh networking, and workspace state management.

ul.li: Fedora KDE 44 Readiness Center — diagnostics for Plasma, Wayland, DNF5, Flatpak, NVIDIA, and more
Security Center with polkit-managed privileged operations
VM Quick-Create and VFIO GPU Passthrough
Optional headless Web API and user daemon
Added Fedora KDE 44 Readiness Center with full diagnostics
Split optional Web API and daemon into subpackages
Extended support bundle to v3 with privacy-masked diagnostics
